---
title: "Target search for miR-584-5p and SH3TC2"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Install once if needed:
# if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) install.packages("BiocManager")
# BiocManager::install("multiMiR")
# BiocManager::install("clusterProfiler")
# BiocManager::install("ReactomePA")
# BiocManager::install("org.Hs.eg.db")
# rm(list=ls())
library(multiMiR)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(ReactomePA)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
```

```{r}
mir_name <- "hsa-miR-584-5p"

# Query experimentally validated targets only
res_valid <- get_multimir(
  mirna = mir_name,
  table = "validated",
  summary = FALSE
)

df_valid <- as_tibble(res_valid@data)

# Keep validated sources used in manuscript
validated_targets <- df_valid %>%
  filter(!is.na(target_symbol)) %>%
  filter(tolower(database) %in% c("mirtarbase", "tarbase", "mirecords")) %>%
  pull(target_symbol) %>%
  unique() %>%
  sort()

cat("Total validated unique targets:", length(validated_targets), "\n")

write.table(
  validated_targets,
  file = "../results/mir584_validated_targets.txt",
  quote = FALSE,
  row.names = FALSE,
  col.names = FALSE
)
```
```{r}
res_all <- get_multimir(
  mirna = mir_name,
  table = "predicted",
  summary = FALSE
)

df_all <- as_tibble(res_all@data)

all_targets <- df_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(target_symbol)) %>%
  pull(target_symbol) %>%
  unique()

cat("Total all unique targets:", length(all_targets), "\n")
sh3tc2_present <- "SH3TC2" %in% all_targets
cat("Is SH3TC2 a validated target in these databases? ", sh3tc2_present, "\n")
```

```{r}


sh3tc2_hits <- df_valid %>%
  filter(target_symbol == "SH3TC2") %>%
  distinct()

if (nrow(sh3tc2_hits) > 0) {
  kable(sh3tc2_hits)
}
```


```{r}
gene_df <- bitr(
  all_targets,
  fromType = "SYMBOL",
  toType = "ENTREZID",
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db
)

cat("Mapped genes:", nrow(gene_df), "\n")

# Save mapped IDs
write.csv(gene_df, "../results/mir584_targets_symbol_to_entrez.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```




```{r}
reactome_result <- enrichPathway(
  gene = unique(gene_df$ENTREZID),
  organism = "human",
  pvalueCutoff = 0.05,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  readable = TRUE
)

reactome_df <- as.data.frame(reactome_result) %>%
  filter(Count >= 3)

write.csv(
  reactome_df,
  "../results/miR-584-5p_reactome_enrichment_validated.csv",
  row.names = FALSE
)

kable(head(reactome_df, 20))
```

```{r}
if (nrow(as.data.frame(reactome_result)) > 0) {
  p_reactome <- dotplot(
    reactome_result,
    showCategory = 20,
    x = "GeneRatio",
    color = "p.adjust",
    size = "Count"
  ) +
    ggtitle("Reactome enrichment for validated miR-584-5p targets") +
    theme_minimal()

  print(p_reactome)

  ggsave(
    filename = "../results/PathwayEnrichment_miR584_validated.png",
    plot = p_reactome,
    width = 8,
    height = 10,
    dpi = 600
  )
}
```
```{r}
# Broad GO search to identify glucocorticoid-related terms
go_result_all <- enrichGO(
  gene = unique(gene_df$ENTREZID),
  OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
  ont = "BP",
  keyType = "ENTREZID",
  readable = TRUE,
  pAdjustMethod = "BH",
  pvalueCutoff = 1,
  qvalueCutoff = 1
)

go_all_df <- as.data.frame(go_result_all)

# gc_hits <- go_all_df %>% filter(grepl("glucocorticoid", Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
gc_hits <- go_all_df %>% filter(ID == "GO:0051384")
kable(gc_hits)

if (nrow(gc_hits) > 0) {
  gc_overlap_genes <- strsplit(gc_hits$geneID[1], "/")[[1]]
  cat("Genes overlapping first glucocorticoid-related GO term:\n")
  print(gc_overlap_genes)

  write.table(
    gc_overlap_genes,
    file = "../results/mir584_glucocorticoid_overlap_genes.txt",
    quote = FALSE,
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = FALSE
  )
}
```
